title: TakeoffItem
description: TakeoffItem: Class storing takeoff values of relevant quantities corresponding to a particular material.

Volume.description: Total volume of the material. Applicable for most takeoffs. Property has a quantity of type Volume meassured in [m³].

Mass.description: Total mass of the material. Applicable for materials with a set density. Property has a quantity of type Mass meassured in [kg].

Area.description: Total area of the material. Applicable for takeoffs of 2-dimensional elements or 2-dimensional parts. Property has a quantity of type Area meassured in [m²].

Length.description: Total length of the material. Applicable for takeoffs of 1-dimensional elements or elements with 1-dimensional parts. Property has a quantity of type Length meassured in [m].

NumberItem.description: Total number of items containing the material in the takeoff. Applicable for most takeoffs.

ElectricCurrent.description: Total Electric current associated with the material. Applicable for takeoffs of some electrical equipment elements. Property has a quantity of type ElectricCurrent meassured in [A].

Energy.description: Total Electric current associated with the material. Applicable for takeoffs of some electrical equipment elements. Property has a quantity of type Energy meassured in [J].

Power.description: Total Power or apparent power associated with the material. Applicable for takeoffs of some electrical equipment elements. Property has a quantity of type EnergyPerUnitTime meassured in [W].

VolumetricFlowRate.description: Total VolumetricFlowRate associated with the material. Applicable for takeoffs of elements relating to flow of substance through the element. Property has a quantity of type VolumetricFlowRate meassured in [m³/s].

_t.description: Optional Type discirminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
